name: flow/flow-handle
description: A connection port on a node edge — where edges attach and interactive connect starts.

meta.name: FlowHandle
meta.description: A connection port on a node edge — where edges attach and interactive connect starts.

props.name: type
props.description: Whether the handle is a connection source or target ('source' | 'target').

props.name: position
props.description: Edge of the node (defaults: source→right, target→left).

props.name: isConnectable
props.description: Whether new connections can start or end at this handle.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Source and target ports

whenToUse: Marking where edges connect to a node
Enabling interactive connect (drag from a source to a target)
whenNotToUse: On nodes that are never connected
intent.a11yRationale: Focusable with a ≥44px coarse-pointer hit area around the visible dot.
